economic_notes: Nation developing Nenagwas Community Development reserve on York Road in Campbell River. Has investments in aquaculture, fisheries, forestry, carbon credits, and grizzly bear tourism through partnerships. Three controlled entities (Chief's Pride Aquaculture Corporation, Chief's Pride Seafoods Inc., Happy as a Clam Shellfish Ltd.) not consolidated due to unavailable data - basis for qualified opinion.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - three controlled entities (Chief's Pride Aquaculture Corporation, Chief's Pride Seafoods Inc., Happy as a Clam Shellfish Ltd.) not consolidated due to unavailable financial data; their balances carried unchanged from prior year. Financial statements were signed April 13, 2023, over two years after the March 31, 2021 year end. Prior year (2020) included a large one-time item: ISC Forgiveness of Treaty Loan of $5,663,069 which drove the $8,070,029 surplus. Five partnerships/GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Expenses_administration mapped to Band Support; expenses_infrastructure mapped to Community Services; expenses_enterprises mapped to Economic Development; expenses_social mapped to Employment Programs. Wages per schedule of expenses by object is $320,119 but segment disclosure shows $273,630 wages and benefits - discrepancy likely due to honoraria ($111,946) being classified separately. No remuneration schedule provided.
